title: Sleep Quality and Depressive Symptoms in College Students
abstract: Poor sleep quality is frequently associated with depressive symptoms in college students. This paper discusses behavioral and academic factors that may influence student well-being.

title: Anxiety Symptoms and Academic Stress in University Populations
abstract: Academic stress, social expectations, and adjustment difficulties may contribute to anxiety symptoms in university populations. Supportive resources may help reduce student distress.

title: AI-Assisted Literature Review Methods in Healthcare Research
abstract: Artificial intelligence tools are increasingly being explored for healthcare literature review tasks including article screening, summarization, and information organization.
